form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into ninth after showing early speed, behind Always Be Brendan at Goulburn over 1710m in a NR up to 47 on March 30 at $2.30. Then a handy effort when a close second after showing early speed, behind Dancing With My Ex at Newcastle over 1609m in a NR 36 to 39 on April 6 at $2.15. Leading contender aided by the draw.
